items.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
items.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, which police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

items.title: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
items.summary: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.

items.title: Rat poison found in HiPP baby food jar in Austria, police say
items.summary: The brand warned on Saturday that consuming the purées may be potentially "life-threatening".

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 保加利亞國會大選　出口民調：親俄前總統遙遙領先
items.summary: 根據出口民調，保加利亞親俄羅斯前總統拉德夫領導的政黨有望在今天國會大選中輕鬆勝出。不過主打反貪腐、結束政府短命惡性循環的拉德夫仍需尋求夥伴結盟才能組成多數政府。  路透社報導，疑歐派前戰鬥機...…

items.title: 路易斯安那州大規模槍擊 8童喪生槍手遭警擊斃
items.summary: 美國路易斯安那州今天發生大規模槍擊事件，造成年齡1歲到約14歲的8名兒童喪生。警方指出，凌晨這起家庭成員相關的槍擊事件中，一名槍手在兩處住家行凶。  美聯社報導，路易斯安那州第3大城希夫...…

items.title: 白宮官員：范斯將率美國代表團赴巴基斯坦對伊朗談判
items.summary: 在美國總統川普宣布自己不會參與行程之後不久，白宮官員今天表示，副總統范斯將率領美國代表團前往巴基斯坦對伊朗進行會談。  法新社報導，在停火協議即將到期之際，川普稍早宣布，他將派遣談判代表前往...…
